subcodes.first_line: O blessed branch sprung from the Divine Tree! Upon thee be the Glory of God, His praise, and the praise of all things, and His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المبارک من السدره الربانیه علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه و ثناء کل شیء و فضله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant
